description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures arranged on a rectangular plinth. At the center, a seated woman in classical attire holds a sheaf of wheat and gazes forward with a serene expression. To her right stands a young girl, also holding a bundle of wheat, while to her left, a young boy kneels, clutching a small animal, possibly a lamb. The figures are barefoot and dressed in flowing garments, with detailed hair and facial features. The composition suggests a pastoral or agrarian theme, with the figures closely grouped and interacting naturally. The surface of the sculpture is smooth with subtle textural details, and the material appears to be weathered stone or marble.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a seated woman flanked by a young girl and boy, all in classical dress, with agricultural motifs. The figures are closely grouped on a rectangular base, evoking a pastoral scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seated woman at the center, flanked by the girl with wheat on the left and the kneeling boy with an animal on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of all three figures, with the girl's bundle of wheat and the boy's kneeling posture more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the three figures, with the woman's hair bun and the arrangement of their garments clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the boy's kneeling position and the girl's side profile, with the woman's arm and wheat sheaf extending forward.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures in a pastoral or agrarian scene
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
